__warnings.note: LEGAL CONSENT TEXT — translated faithfully but a Mainland-Chinese-speaking lawyer should review for legal precision. The English source references 'arbitration clause and class action waiver in Section 15' which has no PRC legal equivalent — kept literal as 第 15 条的仲裁条款与集体诉讼放弃条款.
Age threshold (13+) and parental-consent wording are jurisdiction-specific. Reviewer: confirm the 13–17 minor-with-guardian phrasing is unambiguous in Chinese.
AI disclaimer — 'AI responses may contain errors and are not professional advice'. Translation is conservative.
Vendor names Anthropic (Claude AI) and ElevenLabs kept English. Surrounding text translated.
Language picker — 'English' and 'ChiShona' kept as English names since they appear in the language pack list. Native names ('English' / 'ChiShona') stayed verbatim.
Country names: 澳大利亚, 英国, 美国, 欧盟, 津巴布韦. All standard Mainland transliterations.

Place names (Harare, Bulawayo, Hwange, Victoria Falls, Great Zimbabwe) kept English/canonical — Mainland users may know these as 哈拉雷/布拉瓦约/万基/维多利亚瀑布/大津巴布韦, but Rwendo's brand voice keeps canonical spellings. Reviewer: flip if Mainland users expect 中文 transliterations.
English source hardcodes 'Shona journey' — translated to '绍纳语之旅'. When learnedLanguage isn't Shona, this string should ideally be parameterised; flagged for follow-up.
Age-gate and Family Plan messaging — legal/regulatory precision matters. Reviewer should confirm '13–17' and '16+ in Australia' wording is unambiguous.
Multi-line example — example uses 'My grandmother in Harare' / 'My partner's family'. Translated as natural Chinese examples but kept the place name Harare canonical.
13/13–17 age policy text — legal precision matters.

date.note: 13 岁以下用户无法使用 Rwendo。13–17 岁用户的部分功能会受到限制。

blocked.title: 你需要年满 18 岁
blocked.body: Rwendo 目前要求用户年满 18 岁,才能使用包括 AI 伙伴在内的全部功能。
blocked.family_plan_title: 📋 家庭方案 — 即将推出
blocked.family_plan_body:
我们正在打造一个家庭方案,允许 13–17 岁(或在澳大利亚为 16 岁以上)的用户在父母同意下使用 Rwendo。

大致流程是这样:
• 父母下载 Rwendo
• 父母完成身份验证
• 父母填写你的邮箱并生成一个邀请码
• 你输入邀请码即可使用账户
• 父母随时可以查看你的活动

onboarding.connection_placeholder:
例如:"我在 Harare 的奶奶"
"我伴侣的家人"

留空即可跳过。
